name: Ashford Manor
description: A geography golden: locations, exits, a player, move op, spatial queries.

exits_here.intent: destination ids reachable from the player's current location

here.intent: person entity ids sharing the player's current location

study.description: Tall bookshelves line every wall; a mahogany desk sits beneath the dusty window.

hall.description: A vaulted ceiling soars overhead, hung with faded tapestries.

garden.description: Overgrown rose-beds surround a cracked stone fountain.

manor_history.title: Ashford Manor — A Brief History
manor_history.text: The manor was erected in Year 312 by Lord Edmund Ashford after the western wars. Its study was said to hold every treaty signed in the region.

locket_provenance.title: The Silver Locket
locket_provenance.text: Engraved with the initials E.A., this locket was the personal token of Lady Eleanor Ashford, last of the direct line.
locket_provenance.subject: player
